title: HG Odour Eliminator for All Surfaces, Odour Remover & Fabric Freshener Spray, Bad Smell Remover & Carpet Spray for Hard Surfaces & Soft Furnishings, Pet Odour Remover & Deodoriser - 500ml
features: HG Odour Eliminator Spray: This versatile odour neutraliser and deodorising spray is safe to use on almost all absorbent surfaces. Ideal for households with pets and children
Home and car odour eliminator: Works as an effective urine neutraliser, smell remover and pet odour eliminator. Does not mask the stench but removes the source of the odour once and for all
Contains natural enzymes: Uses natural enzymes and microbes to eat away at odours caused by stains, vomit, pet urine, cigarette smoke, food, cooking or stale and damp smells
Fast acting: Effective within 30 minutes after spraying the surface liberally. Great for carpets, sofas, mattresses, curtains, blinds, car seats, duvets, rugs, throws, pet beds and more
1 x HG Odour Eliminator, 500ml. Discover the full range of HG cleaning products, from HG air freshener to carpet cleaner sprays, stain removers, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays
description: Product Description HG Odour Eliminator for All Surfaces is an ultra effective bad smell remover and fabric spray for all sorts of soft and hard surfaces, from textiles to car upholstery, and pet beds to furniture. The bad smell remover spray eliminates odours at their source, rather than masking them, and quickly and effectively gets rid of odours caused by pet urine, musty smells, damp, cooking odours, food, drinks, vomit, excrement or other nasty niffs. It’s safe to use on almost all surfaces, and the spray contains natural enzymes and microbes which eat away at the source of the smell. It’s great for use all around your home and vehicle, particularly for difficult-to-clean textiles. It works fast to dissolve the odour and leave your furnishings smelling clean and refreshed. Includes: 1 x HG Odour Eliminator For All Surfaces (500ml) How to use: 1. Spray liberally onto the surface 2. The unpleasant odour disappears between 30 minutes and a few hours, depending on the surface. Keep this HG cleaner out of children's reach. Always read the label. Discover the HG professional range of specialist household cleaning products, including HG limescale remover, mould remover, multi-purpose cleaners and all-surface cleaner sprays for your home, office or outside space. Ingredients Benzisothiazolinone, 2-Bromo-2-Nitro- Propane-1, 3-Diol, Perfumes Directions Turn the nozzle by a quarter. Spray the surface especially on the source of odour. Wait 30 minutes for non-porous surfaces and a few hours for porous surfaces for the surface to dry. Suitable for household items, carpets, sofas, mattresses, curtains, shutters, car seats, duvets, pet beds and more. Box Contains 1 x HG Eliminator of all Unpleasent Smells at Source Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: HG International b.v., P.J. Oudweg 41, 1314 CJ Almere, The Netherlands. See more
